creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

9.1 is not yet released, in addition in the light of the recent security 
issue that occured on the FreeBSD.org infrastructure, it is not yet 
clear whether or not there will be available packages for this specific 
release or that we will persue a different method. Anyway; that will be 
described with the release of 9.1 to the crowd. Please bear with us.
